description: It's femininty celebrated and enhanced with this pair of slippers from Inc. 5. With it's sleek design and simple style, this pair works great both as an office wear and for parties.This pair comes with a shoe bag that helps you carry it around in ease.UpperSuede footbed ergonomically padded for absolute comfort and styleWide leather straps in a design with tube sequin work on the upper, and has a toe separator to hold the foot in place in styleOutsoleDurable textured rubber outsole for ultimate grip Sandal careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
